name: Portable Office
description:
Portable Office — Professional Workspace, Delivered in 7-21 Days

A SAMAN portable office installed at a corporate premises in South India. Delivered and ready in 7-21 working days.

You need an office that's ready to use in days, not months. No construction delays, no large capital spend, no waiting on contractors.

A SAMAN portable office is a factory-built, fully fitted workspace — delivered and installed at your location in 7-21 working days. AC provision, false ceiling, partition walls, and electrical fittings included as standard.

Built for businesses, startups, schools, and institutions. Not a site cabin — a proper office you will use every working day.

 What's Included as Standard

Every unit leaves our Bangalore factory fitted and tested. You're not waiting for on-site assembly to get it ready.

  1. Structure: MS frame, insulated sandwich panel walls, single-skin steel roof.
  2. Interior: False ceiling with integrated lighting, full internal wiring, switchboard, and power sockets.
  3. Comfort: AC connection point fitted as standard. AC unit supply available — confirm at quote stage.
  4. Layout: Internal partition walls. Doors and windows with locks and ventilation.

Standard fitout: false ceiling, AC, built-in workstations, storage, and full electrical. This is what your office looks like on day one.

Need network cabling, upgraded flooring, or additional partition rooms? Specify before dispatch and we include it in the factory build.

For buyers who need a unit that's ready to walk into the same day it arrives — no fit-out, no waiting — our readymade office cabin ships pre-built from stock.

Sizes and Who They're For

A 10×10 ft unit seats 2–3 people with desks, chairs, and a small cabinet. A 10×20 ft unit comfortably fits 5–6. Custom layouts and multi-room configurations are available.

10×10 ft: single room for 2–3 people. 10×20 ft: partitioned layout with workspace and meeting area for 5–6. All dimensions internal and approximate.

Most buyers fall into one of three situations:

Starting out or opening a branch. You need a functional space quickly at a manageable cost. The small office cabin is the right starting point — compact, fully fitted, and delivered fast.

Team is growing. A fixed unit works today but becomes a problem within a year. If your headcount will increase, a modular office cabin is designed for this — the base unit is built so a room can be added later without replacing the whole structure.

Multiple units or institutional procurement. Schools, government offices, and businesses equipping multiple locations in one order should see our prefabricated office cabins page — bulk supply, consistent factory quality across every unit.

How Delivery and Installation Works

  1. Share your requirement — location, team size, and move-in date. Call or WhatsApp.
  2. Quote in 24 hours — itemized price covering the unit, transport, and installation at your address.
  3. Order confirmed — factory dispatch within 5 working days.
  4. Installed and ready — flat surface and a power connection point is all you arrange. We handle everything else.

Installation in progress. Our team handles delivery, crane placement, and setup. You arrange a flat surface and power connection — we handle the rest.

South India installations complete within 7 working days of dispatch. If you're relocating an existing unit between locations, the same process applies — call us when you're ready.

For organizations that require factory documentation, pre-dispatch inspection records, and material certification for procurement compliance, the prefabricated portable office cabin page covers that process in full.

Portable Office Price Range

A standard fitted portable office starts at Rs 3,20,000 for a 10×12 ft unit. This covers the cabin, AC provision, false ceiling, partition walls, and installation within 200 km of Bangalore.

What moves the price up: larger size, additional rooms, AC unit supply, flooring upgrade, or network cabling provision.

If you've already decided on the configuration and want to confirm stock availability and payment terms, go to buy portable office cabin directly.

If your requirement is a heavier, industrial-grade office at scale — stackable units, crane-movable, ISO container form factor — that's a different product. See our container office range →

Who Uses a Portable Office

Startups and growing businesses. When a commercial lease doesn't make financial sense yet, a portable office gives you a real, professional workspace from month one. If the location doesn't work out, the office relocates with you.

Businesses expanding to new cities. Set up a branch in 7-21 days — no renovation, no local contractor dependency. A number of our customers have moved the same unit two or three times across different cities as their operations shifted.

Schools and educational institutions. Extra classrooms, admin rooms, or staff offices during expansion or renovation. The interior is configured for the use — the structure is the same across all units.

Schools and training institutions use SAMAN portable offices as classrooms and admin spaces. AC fitted, fully operational on delivery.

Government and institutional offices. Satellite offices for field operations, temporary department workspaces during building works, or a fast solution when a new location needs to be operational before a permanent space is ready.

If you're a construction contractor looking for a site office on an active project, that's a different product built for different conditions. Our site office porta cabin range is built for that.

Frequently Asked Questions

What is the difference between a portable office and a container office?

A portable office is cabin-based — lighter, interior-finished, designed for daily business use. A container office is built from an ISO shipping container — heavier, stackable, industrial-grade. Different structures for different buyer needs.

Can a portable office be used as a permanent workspace?

Yes. The MS frame lasts 10–15 years with normal maintenance. It is relocatable — not temporary. Many of our customers have used the same unit for 5 to 8 years across different locations.

Can the office be expanded if our team grows?

If you order a modular unit, yes. The base cabin is built with an expansion point — an additional room connects without replacing the original structure. Confirm this requirement at order stage so we build the connection point in at the factory.

Do portable offices require a building permit in India?

In most cases, no permit is required for a relocatable structure. Requirements vary by state and land type. For long-term permanent-placement installations, confirm with your local authority before ordering.

How many people does a standard unit fit?

A 10×10 ft unit fits 2–3 people comfortably with desks and storage. A 10×20 ft unit fits 5–6. Tell us your team size when you enquire and we'll recommend the right layout.

Is air conditioning included?

Every unit includes an AC connection point. We can supply and fit the AC unit as part of the order — specify this when requesting your quote.

Get a quote in 24 hours.

Tell us your location, team size, and when you need the office ready. We'll send you a clear, itemized price the same day — no back-and-forth.

Request a free quote → or call us at 09708989937

meta_data.value: Portable Office: Cabin-Based Workspaces for Business │ SAMAN
Portable office solutions for businesses, startups, schools, and institutions. AC-ready, factory-fitted cabins delivered across India in 7-21 days. Get a free quote.

value.name: Portable Office FAQs — Pricing, Delivery & Setup

mainEntity.name: What is the cost of a 20×10 ft portable office in India?

acceptedAnswer.text: A standard 20×10 ft portable office in India costs between ₹2.1 lakh and ₹2.5 lakh for a shell unit. Fully fitted models with interiors, HVAC, and lighting can reach ₹3.5 lakh or more. Prices vary based on wall panels, finishes, and add-ons like toilets or branding.

Installation is fast. Once delivered, a portable office cabin can be placed on RCC blocks or strip footing in one to two days. Units arrive prefabricated from the factory, so only utility hookups and inspections remain. Even custom cabins rarely exceed one week for full setup.

mainEntity.name: Do I need permits for a portable cabin?

acceptedAnswer.text: Permits depend on local municipal rules. In most cases, short-term use for construction sites or temporary offices may not need full building permits. For long-term placement, zoning approvals and fire compliance certificates under NBC India may be required. Always confirm with your local authority.

A portable office built with mild steel, PUF panels, or ACP cladding lasts 10–20 years. Lifespan depends on material, maintenance, and usage. Regular repainting, panel inspections, and AMC servicing extend service life, ensuring the cabin remains safe and functional throughout its cycle.

mainEntity.name: Can portable offices include toilets and pantries?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, modern porta cabins can be designed with toilets, washrooms, and pantries. Plumbing, water tanks, and ventilation systems are integrated at the factory. These features make the cabin more self-sufficient and are common in corporate, retail, and school applications.

mainEntity.name: Are portable site offices safe in heavy rain & wind?

acceptedAnswer.text: Portable offices are engineered for India’s climate. Double-slope PPGI or PUF roofs prevent leaks during monsoon, while structural bracing handles wind loads. As long as installation is on a proper RCC foundation, a site office cabin remains safe in heavy weather.

mainEntity.name: Do suppliers provide warranty & AMC support?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. Reputable suppliers provide 12–24 month workmanship warranties and Annual Maintenance Contracts (AMC). AMC packages usually cover electrical, HVAC, and preventive inspections, with SLA commitments of 24–48 hours for service requests. Always ask for written coverage before purchase.

mainEntity.name: Can I rent instead of buy a portable office?

acceptedAnswer.text: Absolutely. Rentals are popular for short projects of three to twelve months. Monthly rents for a 20×10 ft cabin start around ₹20,000. Renting reduces upfront costs and suits temporary needs, while buying is better for long-term or repeat use across projects.

mainEntity.name: Still Have Questions? Talk to Our Experts

acceptedAnswer.text: Choosing the right portable office cabin involves understanding costs, features, and compliance. Our team provides tailored quotes, spec sheets, and guidance. 👉 Still Have Questions? Talk to Our Experts.
